description: You are logged into wger fitness manager as the admin user. An existing nutrition plan called 'Lean Bulk Plan' has been created but has no daily nutritional goals configured yet. Set the following daily nutritional goals on the 'Lean Bulk Plan': Energy (3200 kcal), Protein (180 g), Carbohydrates (400 g), Fat (90 g), and Fiber (35 g). Ensure all five goal values are saved and persisted.
